title: TuffStuff - Knee Pads, One Pair - Offers Extra Knee Protection & Support with Articulated Design - Increased Comfort & Flexibility - Customisable Fit - Ideal for Trade Professionals
description: Product Description TuffStuff’s knee pads are expertly designed to offer the perfect balance of comfort, durability, and support when kneeling. Our quality knee pads offer the support you need to keep working efficiently and comfortably all day long. Designed with trade workers in mind, the TuffStuff knee pads are ideal for those that work in manual labour jobs that require extra protection and cushioning when kneeling. Whether you're a builder, carpenter, painter, plumber, electrician, engineer, or any other trade professional, our knee protection offers the perfect combination of comfort, flexibility and durability. The TuffStuff knee pads are designed with a segmented, twenty-piece construction, allowing you to easily trim and adjust the pads to your preferred measurements. This customisable fit ensures a snug, secure placement on your knees, providing maximum support and comfort during long periods of wear.Our knee pads are made from 100% Ethylene-Vinyl Acetate (EVA), with deep articulations that naturally fold to the shape of your knee. These knee pads deliver optimal comfort and flexibility, reducing strain and fatigue during extended work sessions. These knee pads are expertly designed to be fully compatible with TuffStuff trousers, offering a superb fit for both top and bottom-loaders. They provide enhanced protection and comfort during tough tasks. Box Contains 1 x Garment Manufacturer Contact Information Castle Clothing Ltd Blyth Road Industrial Estate, Halesworth, Suffolk, IP19 8EN See more
